business.name: Agentic Evidence
business.primary_job: Agentic technical interview evidence layer for Hatchways-style assessments.
business.current_motion: Candidate AI-evidence entry, reviewer handoff, repo-packaged Claude JSONL exports, assignment packet, guided Claude VM behavior, and finish checklist are live; 2026-05-04 commit `4f37230` added `/candidate/:sessionId/task`, `ae-task`, `ae-submit-steps`, Claude guidance injection, and procedural-prompt score filtering.
business.next_move: Add hidden-test grading, optional GitHub App install UX, and reviewer analysis fields over captured sessions.

business.name: AI Dev Board
business.primary_job: AI/ML jobs board with REST API, MCP server, company claims, and promoted listings.
business.current_motion: API/MCP/indexed-job distribution plus employer conversion flow; `/post` plan-first flow and `/jobs` canonical redirect are live after design pass commit `ddc8b65`; `/tag/agents` visual cleanup is live in commit `4c30bea` with `AI Agent Jobs` title/meta and compact hero/search/filter layout; `foundry-businesses/ai-dev-jobs` is only a marketing/outreach mirror on 1P.
business.next_move: Keep API invariant green; improve SEO indexing and hiring-side conversion surfaces.
